##RRUFFID=R060282
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ce_4_(Ti,Fe^2+^,Fe^3+^)_5_O_8_(Si_2_O_7_)_2_
##LOCALITY=Arondu, Basha Valley, Baltistan, Pakistan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Herb Obodda
##DESCRIPTION=Black fragment
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060282
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ce_2.04_La_0.79_Nd_0.75_Ca_0.42_)(Ti_2.79_Fe^2+^_1.83_Fe^3+^_0.14_Mg_0.11_Th_0.05_Nb^5+^_0.05_Al_0.03_)O_8_(Si_2.00_O_7_)_2_ ; lighter phase
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
